message:
fix(node): convert 147 remaining unbounded self.push() sites to push_bounded() across codebase

Systematic audit found ~147 files with unbounded Vec::push() on struct fields
that could lead to memory exhaustion under adversarial input. Each site now uses
push_bounded() with MAX_*=4096 capacity guards, draining oldest entries on overflow.

Also fixes: duplicate push_bounded definition in impossible_default.rs,
BarrierReceipt typo → BarrierAuditReceipt in barrier_primitives.rs,
borrow checker errors in compatibility_gate.rs and verifier_economy/mod.rs.

7415 tests pass, clippy -D warnings clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
